title: How to Make Your AI Agents Work Better (With Context Hygiene)
summary: Jordan Urbs presents context hygiene as a three-layer framework for AI agents: Skills, Harnesses, and Hygiene. The approach uses CLAUDE.md behavioral files, multi-agent orchestration, lazy loading, and subagents to preserve context across conversations and maintain clean context windows in production AI workflows.
